text:
LONG NAME: RC_RP_IND_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: R = bypass representative payee 

COMMENT: This field comes from the REV-RP-IND-CD that is present on the first claim record RP-IND-CD on the first 
claim then take the first found code (R) on any of the other claims that make up the stay. 

Note that there is also a Claim Representative Payee (RP) Indicator Code (SAS variable called 
CLM_RP_IND_CD). 

This field is first available in 2015. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
